n: "In the beginning" — Genesis creation echoed in John's prologue
God created all things by His word — faith in the unseen Creator
God commanded light to shine — paralleled with spiritual illumination
Image of God — Christ as the image of the invisible God
Man made in God's image — man as the image and glory of God
God rested on the seventh day — Sabbath rest fulfilled in Christ
Adam formed from dust — first man of the earth, earthy
Death enters through disobedience — sin and death through one man
Man shall leave father and mother — Paul quotes in marriage teaching
The serpent in Eden — that old serpent, the Devil
Seed of the woman — God sent forth His Son, made of a woman
Bruise the serpent's head — God shall bruise Satan under your feet
Seed of woman crushes serpent — the man child who shall rule all nations
God provided animal skins — without shedding of blood, no remission
Abel's offering accepted — by faith Abel offered a more excellent sacrifice
Abel's blood cries from ground — Jesus' blood speaks better things
Enoch walked with God and was translated — by faith Enoch was translated
Noah found grace — by faith Noah prepared an ark
Noah saved through the flood — eight souls saved by water, a figure of baptism
Whoso sheds man's blood — they that take the sword shall perish
Call of Abram — Stephen recounts God's call to Abraham
All families blessed through Abraham — the gospel preached to Abraham
Promise to Abraham's seed — to thy seed, which is Christ
Melchizedek blesses Abram — Christ a priest after order of Melchizedek
Abraham believed God, counted righteous — faith reckoned as righteousness
Abraham believed God — faith counted for righteousness
Everlasting covenant with Abraham — God's mercy to Abraham forever
All nations blessed in Abraham — in thy seed all kindreds blessed
Cast out the bondwoman — Paul applies Sarah and Hagar allegory
Abraham offers his only son — God gave His only begotten Son
God will provide a lamb — Behold the Lamb of God
In blessing I will bless thee — God's oath to Abraham confirmed
The elder shall serve the younger — quoted in Romans on election
Jacob's ladder with angels — angels ascending and descending on Son of Man
Sceptre from Judah — the Lion of the tribe of Judah
God of Abraham, Isaac, Jacob — Jesus quotes to prove resurrection
I AM THAT I AM — before Abraham was, I am
Passover lamb without blemish — redeemed with precious blood of Christ
Blood of the lamb saves from death — Christ our propitiation through blood
Passover lamb slain — Christ our passover is sacrificed for us
No bone shall be broken — not a bone of Jesus broken
Firstborn sanctified to the Lord — Jesus presented as firstborn
Israel passed through the sea — our fathers all passed through the sea
Manna from heaven — bread from heaven, as Moses gave
Manna in the wilderness — I am the living bread from heaven
Water from the rock — they drank of that spiritual Rock, which was Christ
Kingdom of priests, holy nation — ye are a royal priesthood
The Lord thy God — thou shalt love the Lord thy God
Honour thy father and mother — Paul quotes fifth commandment
Thou shalt not kill — Jesus expands in Sermon on the Mount
Thou shalt not commit adultery — Jesus expands on heart adultery
Eye for eye, tooth for tooth — Jesus contrasts with turning the cheek
Blood of the covenant — this is the blood of the covenant
Make tabernacle after the pattern — Moses warned to make after the pattern
Lord gracious and merciful — the Word full of grace and truth
Day of Atonement ritual — Christ entered the holy place once
Life of the flesh is in the blood — without blood no remission
Be ye holy, for I am holy — Peter quotes Leviticus
Love thy neighbour as thyself — second great commandment
Feast of weeks/Pentecost — the day of Pentecost fulfilled
Year of Jubilee — liberty to the captives, acceptable year
Not a bone of the Passover lamb broken — fulfilled at crucifixion
Bronze serpent lifted up — as Moses lifted up the serpent
A star out of Jacob — I am the bright and morning star
Hear O Israel, the Lord our God is one — Jesus quotes the Shema
Love God with all your heart — the great commandment
Thou shalt fear the Lord — Jesus rebukes Satan with this verse
Thou shalt not tempt the Lord — Jesus answers Satan's temptation
Man shall not live by bread alone — Jesus quotes in temptation
A prophet like Moses — Peter identifies Jesus as the prophet
A prophet like Moses — Philip tells Nathanael they found him
God will put words in the prophet's mouth — Jesus spoke what the Father gave
Two or three witnesses required — Jesus establishes church discipline
Cursed is everyone hanged on a tree — Christ made a curse for us
Thou shalt not muzzle the ox — Paul applies to minister support
Cursed who confirms not all the law — as many as are of works of law
The word is very nigh thee — the word of faith which we preach
Vengeance is mine — Paul quotes on not avenging ourselves
Rejoice, O ye nations — Paul quotes on Gentile inclusion
Boaz redeems Ruth — Boaz in the genealogy of Christ
Davidic covenant — throne of David, kingdom forever
I will be his Father, he my Son — applied to Christ
Queen of Sheba visits Solomon — queen of the south shall rise
Elijah and the widow — many widows in Israel in Elijah's time
Elijah alone is left — Paul quotes on the remnant of Israel
Seven thousand who have not bowed to Baal — the reserved remnant
Why do the heathen rage — apostles quote on opposition to Christ
Thou art my Son, this day begotten — Paul quotes at Antioch
Thou art my Son — applied to Christ's superiority over angels
Out of the mouth of babes — Jesus quotes when children praise Him
What is man that thou art mindful — applied to Christ made lower than angels
I have set the Lord always before me — Peter quotes at Pentecost
Thou wilt not leave my soul in hell — Christ's resurrection foretold
Nor suffer thine Holy One to see corruption — Paul quotes at Antioch
My God, why hast thou forsaken me — Jesus cries from the cross
They mock and wag their heads — passers-by revile Jesus
He trusted in God, let Him deliver — chief priests mock Jesus
Bones out of joint, heart like wax — crucifixion agony foretold
They pierced my hands and feet — nail prints in Jesus' hands
They part my garments, cast lots — soldiers divide Jesus' clothes
Cast lots for my vesture — fulfilled at the cross
Declare thy name to my brethren — Christ not ashamed to call us brethren
The Lord is my shepherd — I am the good shepherd
The earth is the Lord's — Paul quotes on food offered to idols
Into thy hands I commit my spirit — Jesus' last words on the cross
O taste and see the Lord is good — Peter quotes on spiritual milk
He keepeth all his bones, none broken — no bone of Jesus broken
They hated me without a cause — Jesus quotes about persecution
Sacrifice and offering thou didst not desire — a body hast thou prepared
He that eateth bread lifted his heel — Judas' betrayal foretold
Thy throne, O God, is forever — applied to Christ
Against thee only have I sinned — Paul quotes on God's judgment
Thou hast ascended on high, led captivity — Paul applies to Christ
Zeal for thine house hath eaten me up — disciples remember at temple
They gave me vinegar to drink — offered to Jesus on the cross
Let his habitation be desolate — Peter applies to Judas
I will open my mouth in parables — Jesus teaches in parables
I said, ye are gods — Jesus quotes in debate with Jews
Covenant with David, seed on throne — Peter quotes at Pentecost
He shall give angels charge — Satan quotes in temptation of Jesus
Today if ye will hear his voice — warning against hardened hearts
Of old thou hast laid the foundation of the earth — applied to Christ
Who maketh his angels spirits — applied to show Christ above angels
Let another take his office — Peter applies to replacing Judas
The Lord said unto my Lord — Jesus quotes to show He is David's Lord
Sit thou at my right hand — Peter quotes at Pentecost
Sit on my right hand — Christ exalted above angels
Priest forever after order of Melchizedek — Christ's eternal priesthood
Priest after order of Melchizedek — Christ's superior priesthood
I believed, therefore I spoke — Paul quotes on faith and testimony
The Lord is my helper, I will not fear — confidence in God
The stone the builders rejected — Jesus applies to Himself
Stone rejected became head corner — Peter preaches about Jesus
Stone which builders disallowed — Peter applies to Christ
Blessed is he that cometh — crowds shout at triumphal entry
Of the fruit of thy body on the throne — Christ on David's throne
Despise not the chastening of the Lord — Hebrews quotes on discipline
If thine enemy hunger feed him — Paul quotes on overcoming evil
Except the Lord of hosts left a seed — Paul quotes on remnant
Isaiah saw His glory — John says Isaiah saw Christ's glory
Hearing ye shall hear and not understand — Jesus explains parables
Hearing ye shall hear — Paul quotes to Jewish leaders in Rome
A virgin shall conceive, Immanuel — fulfilled in Jesus' birth
A stone of stumbling — Christ a stone of stumbling to unbelievers
A stone of stumbling and rock of offence — Paul applies to Israel
Light in Galilee — Jesus begins ministry in Galilee
Unto us a child is born — the throne of David given to Jesus
Wonderful Counsellor, Prince of Peace — born in the city of David
Rod out of the stem of Jesse — root of Jesse, Gentiles shall hope

He will swallow up death — death is swallowed up in victory
God will wipe away tears — no more tears in the new creation
A precious corner stone — Paul quotes on Christ the foundation
Chief corner stone, elect, precious — Peter applies to Christ
This people draws near with lips, heart far — Jesus quotes against Pharisees
Eyes of the blind opened — Jesus tells John's disciples of His works
Voice crying in the wilderness — fulfilled in John the Baptist
Voice in the wilderness — Mark identifies John the Baptist
Voice crying in wilderness — Luke identifies John the Baptist
Voice in the wilderness — John the Baptist identifies himself
All flesh is as grass — Peter quotes on the enduring word
My servant, my elect — Matthew applies to Jesus
A light to the Gentiles — Simeon's prophecy about Jesus
A light to the Gentiles — Paul and Barnabas quote when turning to Gentiles
I am the first and the last — Alpha and Omega, beginning and end
Every knee shall bow — Paul quotes on universal confession
Light to the Gentiles, salvation to the end — Paul applies
In an acceptable time I heard thee — Paul quotes on salvation
Beautiful feet of them that preach — Paul quotes on evangelism
To whom he was not spoken of — Paul's mission to unreached
Who hath believed our report — John quotes on unbelief
Who hath believed our report — Paul quotes on faith from hearing
Despised and rejected — the Son of Man must suffer many things
He bore our griefs — Jesus heals the sick in fulfillment
By his stripes we are healed — Peter applies to Christ's atonement
All we like sheep gone astray — ye were as sheep going astray
As a sheep before shearers is dumb — Ethiopian eunuch reads this
He opened not his mouth — Jesus held his peace before the council
With the rich in his death — buried in rich man Joseph's tomb
Numbered with the transgressors — Jesus crucified between two thieves
Numbered with transgressors — crucified with two thieves
Rejoice, thou barren — Paul allegorizes Sarah
Sure mercies of David — Paul quotes at Antioch Pisidia
Their feet swift to shed blood — Paul quotes on universal sinfulness
The Redeemer shall come to Zion — all Israel shall be saved
Spirit of the Lord upon me — Jesus reads and claims fulfillment in Nazareth
Thy salvation cometh — Jesus enters Jerusalem on a donkey
Eye hath not seen — Paul quotes on God's prepared blessings
New heavens and new earth — John sees the new creation
Heaven is my throne — Stephen quotes in his defense
Rachel weeping for her children — fulfilled in slaughter of innocents
New covenant — Hebrews quotes on the new covenant in Christ
Law written on hearts — the new covenant promise
I will set up one shepherd — I am the good shepherd
My tabernacle with them, I their God — God shall dwell with them
God shall set up an everlasting kingdom — His kingdom shall have no end
Son of Man coming in clouds — Jesus prophesies His return
Son of man on clouds of heaven — Jesus before the high priest
Coming with clouds — behold He cometh with clouds
Seventy weeks decreed — the time of Messiah's coming
Messiah shall be cut off — Jesus' death foretold by Daniel
Many that sleep shall awake — resurrection of life and damnation
Ye are sons of the living God — Paul quotes on Gentile calling
I will say, Thou art my people — which in time past were not a people
I desired mercy, not sacrifice — Jesus quotes twice
Out of Egypt I called my son — Jesus' return from Egypt
I will pour out my Spirit — fulfilled at Pentecost
Offered sacrifices in wilderness 40 years — Stephen quotes
I will raise up the tabernacle of David — James quotes at the Jerusalem council
Jonah three days in fish — as Jonah was three days, so the Son of Man
Out of Bethlehem shall come a ruler — Jesus born in Bethlehem
The just shall live by faith — Paul's central gospel declaration
The just shall live by faith — Paul proves justification by faith
The just shall live by faith — endurance in the faith
I will shake the heavens and earth — yet once more I shake all things

All have sinned — Scripture concluded all under sin
Justified by faith apart from works — not justified by works of law

Justified by faith, we have peace — by grace through faith

All things work for good — predestined according to His purpose

Be transformed by renewing of your mind — renewed in the spirit of your mind

Put on the Lord Jesus Christ — as many as baptized put on Christ

Baptized into one body — one body and one Spirit
Love chapter — love is the fulfillment of the law

Made sin for us — Christ became a curse for us

Dead in trespasses and sins — dead in sins, made alive
Abolished enmity, the law — blotting out the handwriting of ordinances
Lowliness, meekness, longsuffering — put on mercy, kindness, humility
Put off the old man — put off the old man with his deeds
Putting away lying — lie not one to another

Psalms, hymns, spiritual songs — teaching and admonishing with song
Wives, submit to your husbands — wives submit, as is fit in the Lord
Husbands, love your wives — husbands, love your wives
Children, obey your parents — children, obey in all things
Fathers, provoke not your children — fathers, provoke not
Servants, obey your masters — servants, obey your masters
Masters, treat servants justly — give what is just and equal
Be strong in the Lord — strengthened with all might
Let this mind be in you — Christ washed disciples' feet as example
Every knee shall bow — Paul quotes Isaiah in both letters
The Lord shall descend with a shout — the trumpet shall sound
One mediator between God and men — mediator of a better covenant
All scripture is God-breathed — holy men moved by the Holy Ghost
God spoke through His Son — the Word was with God
Express image of God's person — the image of the invisible God
Partaker of flesh and blood — made in the likeness of men
The word of God is a two-edged sword — out of His mouth a sharp sword
Great high priest — Christ died and rose again
Christ shall appear the second time — surely I come quickly
Faith is substance of things hoped for — we are saved by hope
Without faith impossible to please God — they in the flesh cannot please God
Abraham offered Isaac — was not Abraham justified by works when he offered
Run with patience the race — run that ye may obtain
Be doers of the word — the doers of the law shall be justified
Faith without works is dead — faith which worketh by love

Peter to the scattered — James to the twelve tribes scattered
Christ the chief cornerstone — built upon the foundation of apostles
Christ died, the just for unjust — Christ died for the ungodly
God resisteth the proud — God resisteth the proud
The devil as a roaring lion — put on the whole armour of God
Day of the Lord, heavens pass — new heaven and new earth
That which was from the beginning — In the beginning was the Word
Christ the propitiation for sins — God set forth as propitiation
God is love — God is a Spirit, worship in spirit and truth
We love him because he first loved us — God commendeth His love toward us
Three that bear record — the Word was with God, the Word was God
Faithful witness, first begotten — Jesus came to bear witness to truth
Coming with clouds, every eye see — Son of Man coming in clouds
Alpha and Omega — the first and the last, saith the Lord
I am the first and the last — I am the Lord, the first and last
Tree of life in paradise — tree of life in the garden of Eden
Holy, holy, holy — seraphim cry Holy in Isaiah's vision
Lion of Judah — Judah is a lion's whelp
Lamb as it had been slain — Behold the Lamb of God
God shall wipe away tears — He will swallow up death
Kingdoms become the Lord's — God shall set up everlasting kingdom

Lord of lords, King of kings — God of gods, Lord of kings

Treading the winepress — I have trodden the winepress alone
Satan bound — the serpent's head bruised
New heaven and new earth — Isaiah's prophecy of new creation

No more tears, death, sorrow — God will wipe away tears

No need of sun — the Lord shall be thine everlasting light

Tree of life — tree of life in Eden restored in new creation
No more curse — reversal of the curse on the ground
No need of sun, the Lord gives light — the Lord shall be thy light

Grace and truth came by Jesus — ye are not under law but grace
The Lamb of God — as of a lamb without blemish
Born again — being born again of incorruptible seed
God so loved the world He gave His Son — God commendeth His love

Passed from death to life — we have passed from death unto life
I am the bread of life — they shall hunger and thirst no more
I am the light of the world — God is light, in Him no darkness
I and my Father are one — these three are one
I am the resurrection and the life — death swallowed up in victory
New commandment: love one another — His commandment that we love
I am the way, the truth, the life — no other name for salvation

I am the true vine — Gentiles grafted into the olive tree

This is life eternal, to know God — we may know Him that is true
That they may be one — he that abideth in Him ought to walk as He walked
Sanctify them through thy truth — the Spirit is truth
Receive ye the Holy Ghost — they were all filled with the Holy Ghost
Written that ye might believe — written that ye may know ye have life
Repent and be baptized — baptized into Christ
Continued in fellowship — not forsaking the assembling of yourselves
One heart and one soul — being of one accord, one mind

Through grace we are saved — by grace ye are saved through faith

Feed the church of God — feed the flock of God
Be ye perfect as your Father — be ye holy in all manner

Lay not up treasures on earth — set your affection on things above
Seek first the kingdom — my God shall supply all your need
